entries.note: Canonical root execution now routes through the authored-body frontend seam instead of calling raw execution directly.
Effect execution helpers now route through the authored-body frontend seam instead of calling raw execution directly.
Kernel-backed effect execution no longer captures through raw shift.
Public algebraic builders now route through the authored-body frontend seam instead of calling raw execution directly.
The authored-body frontend seam now interprets prompt operations directly without delegating to raw reset or shift.
The runtime-success survey fixture executes through the lowered runtime seam instead of raw root execution.
Public examples now delegate to the lowered runtime seam instead of the old root execution contract.
Witness runners now delegate to the lowered runtime seam instead of the old root execution contract.
Shipped root benches now benchmark lowered execution instead of the old raw root execution contract.
